bacon-and-cheese-spaghetti-squash-bake.name: Bacon And Cheese Spaghetti Squash Bake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a casserole dish.
Coat the inside of squash with about 1 tablespoon olive oil. Place squash, cut-side down, on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until squash is tender, about 30 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes.
Shred squash flesh with a fork and transfer to a large bowl. Add 3/4 cup Cheddar cheese, bacon bits, butter, salt, and black pepper; mix until well blended. Transfer to the prepared casserole dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until heated through, about 45 minutes.
Remove casserole from the oven. Sprinkle with remaining 3/4 cup Cheddar cheese and continue baking until cheese is browned and bubbly, 15 to 20 minutes more.

bacon-and-onion-quiche-recipe-comedera.name: Bacon And Onion Quiche Recipe
bacon-and-onion-quiche-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de quiche de bacon y cebolla
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Then place the broken mass into a mold and bordnea for 5 minutes at 180 ° C
Cut the ham into pieces. Drop the butter into a frying pan and dorate the bacon with the onion abode in julians.
Coloca en un bol, los 4 huevos, vierte la nata y condimenta con sal y tomillo al gusto. Mezcla muy bien hasta que se integren perfectamente.
When the dough is cooked, remove from the oven and let rest. He then incorporates the bacon and onion frying. Produce and pour the cream and egg mixture.
Put the tomato plates and purple for 20 minutes at 180 ° C until they cover.
Retira del horno, deja reposar, desmolda y corta en porciones.
Company with salad and enjoy.

bacon-jalapeno-popper-pinwheels.name: Bacon Jalapeño Popper Pinwheels
instructions: In a pan, cook bacon until crisp, then chop into small pieces.
Discard excess fat (reserve approximately 2 tablespoons).
In the same pan, sauté the onions in the reserved fat until they start to become translucent.
Add the jalapeños. Cook until the onions start to caramelize and remove from heat.
Preheat oven to 191°C (190°C) and cover a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, bacon, cheddar, pepper, garlic powder, and jalapeño mixture. Stir until thoroughly incorporated.
On a lightly floured surface, gently roll out the puff pastry until the surface is smooth and even.
Spread the japapeño mixture on the pastry sheet, stopping 1 inch (2 ½ cm) from the top of the dough.
Starting at the bottom, tightly roll upwards and pinch the top edge to seal into a log shape.
Cut the roll every 1½ inches (3 ¾ cm). Place the pieces face-up, 2 inches (5 cm) apart on the baking sheet. Sprinkle the tops of the pastries with cheddar.
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the sides of the pastries are a light golden color.
Enjoy!

bacon-lettuce-tomato-and-avocado-salad.name: Bacon, Lettuce, Tomato, And Avocado Salad
instructions: Cook bacon until crispy. Drain on a paper towel, then set aside.
Place chopped lettuce, tomatoes, cucumber, avocados and bacon in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, balsamic vinegar, mustard, salt, and lemon juice to form the dressing.
Toss the salad with the dressing.
Enjoy!

baked-chicken-with-green-chile-and-chees.name: Baked Chicken with Green Chile and Cheese
baked-chicken-with-green-chile-and-chees.original_name: Pollo Horneado Con Chile Verde y Queso

ingredients.item: Sergeant ® block extra sharp cheddar cheese

instructions: place the green chilies in a frying pan, turning them for 8 minutes.
Then add the pits and ion to the frying frying pan for 5 minutes to show a little.
Let the steaks and ion cool. Then put all the surrounded ingredients into a clear next to the cilantro, garlic, chicken stock, cum, oregan, black pepper and soft cream cheese.
Clean the ingredients till the mixture has a smooth consistency.
On the other hand, it combines all spices and mix them.
Cut chicken breaks in half and cover them with spices.
Add oil to the frying pan and dorate the chicken on each side.
Take the chicken from the frying bread and put it into a baking bread.
Now, cover the chicken with the creamy sauce.
Filling your Sarge ® Extra Sharp Cheese block.
Cover the top of the chicken with Sliced Colby-Jack and then add the Extra Sharp Cheddar Cheese Grated.
Cover with aluminium paper and bordnea at 350 degrees for about 20 minutes.

baked-cod-teleculinaria.name: Baked Cod
instructions: Wash the potatoes and dispose of them on a tray, sprinkle them with salt and pepper and put them in the oven preheated at 180°C for 45 minutes. Then withdraw and reserve.
Descasque e lave as cebolas e os dentes de alho. Corte as cebolas em rodelas e pique os dentes de alho.

Lay the cod on a tray, put garlic teeth, onions and red morrone pepper strips on top. Water with olive oil, add the laurel leaf and put it in the oven for 35 minutes until it is roasted. Then remove, serve with baked chips and sprinkle with chopped parsley.

baked-cod-on-a-bed-of-vegetables-and-mas.name: Baked Cod On A Bed Of Vegetables And Mashed Potatoes
baked-cod-on-a-bed-of-vegetables-and-mas.original_name: Bacalhau assado em cama de legumes e esmagada de batata
instructions: Disengage the cod. Wash the potatoes, cut them in half, make them boil with the peel in salt-tempered water, drain them, let them simmer, remove their skin and crush them. Pass the olives through water, dry them, pick them up and mix them with the potato.

Lave a courgette e a beringela, retire-lhes as extremidades e corte-as em palitos. Lave os pimentos, rejeite-lhes as sementes e peles brancas e corte-os em palitos finos. Descasque e lave os dentes de alho e pique-os finamente.

Place the cod loins on a tray, add the laurel leaf, season with pepper and half the garlic, water with half the olive oil and take the preheated oven to 180°C until roasted. Heat the rest of the olive oil in a pot, add the rest of the garlic, the courgette, the eggplant, the peppers and the onions, season the pepper with salt and let it saute until soft. Lay on a platter, put on the cod loins and serve with the potato crushed.

baked-cod-pastries-teleculinaria.name: Baked Cod Pastries

ingredients.item: 50 g of grated bread + grated bread

Pass the potatoes through the veal pass and add the garlic teeth and the chopped onions. Clean the cod of skin and spines and undo it very well. Add also to potatoes as well as yolks, grated bread and parsley to taste. Retrieve the salt and pepper spices and stir well.

Garnish some trays with olive oil and start the oven at 200 degrees. Mold the cod pastels with two tablespoons or with the help of some grated bread. Lay them on the trays and put them in the oven until they're golden.

baked-crawfish-dip.name: Baked Crawfish Dip

ingredients.item: Cooked and peeled whole crawfish tails
Liquid shrimp and crab boil seasoning

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Combine crawfish tails, cream cheese, sour cream, green onions, garlic, mustard, and crab boil seasoning in a large mixing bowl. Mix with an electric hand mixer until the consistency is nice and creamy.
Place mixture in an oven-safe dish. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top of the mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top is lightly browned, about 20 minutes.

baked-eggplants-with-ham-and-cheese-pequ.name: Baked Eggplants With Ham And Cheese
baked-eggplants-with-ham-and-cheese-pequ.original_name: Berenjenas con jamón y queso al horno
instructions: We cut the eggplants in half, we add salt and let them rest half an hour in a drainer to let go of the bitterness. While we preheat the oven at 180 ° C.

We washed the eggplants, we made them some diagonal cuts, we put an oil scuba above them and a little salt and baked them for half an hour. When ready we remove the pulp from the eggplants with a spoon, care to avoid breaking the skin that will serve as a recipient. We leave the seatboats of the eggplants at an oven fountain, ready for the pilling that we will incorporate.

In a frying pan we put the onion and we soften till clear, and then we add the ham cut into pieces that we leap and finally the eggplant meat. We have been pampering. We added the fried tomato and we mixed up. We filled the eggplants with the mixture and we sprinked with the mozzarella and put some pits of butter and put some pieces of ham and some onion and cherry tomatoes and so on. Then we sprinkle with oregano and get into the oven till the cheese melts.

baked-rigatoni-recipe-comedera.name: Baked Rigatoni Recipe
baked-rigatoni-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de rigatoni al horno fácil

ingredients.item: 300 g ground meat (re, pork or mixed)
500 ml tomato sauce or crushed tomatoes

He steals rigatoni with abundant water with salt till they get to the dente. Retire, scrain and mix with an olive oil chorrit. Reserve.

When the mean's ready and you have a juicy step, but we have been put out and let them stand.

Incorporates parmesan cheese above and leads to an oven.
Baked for about 20 minutes at 200 ° C until a crispy and golden cape forms.
Once ready, remove from the oven and let some rest.
Serve and enjoy.

baked-stuffed-hake-with-prawns-mushrooms.name: Baked Stuffed Hake With Prawns, Mushrooms And Ham
baked-stuffed-hake-with-prawns-mushrooms.original_name: Merluza rellena al horno con langostinos, setas y jamón
instructions: We clear the mushrooms with a cloth and cut them into strips, we scattering slightly with a few ham strips. Once we have been out of the fire we have added pitted locusts.
Ponemos esta mezcla sobre una de las colas de merluza.
We cover with the other tail. We put on the oven plate, preheated at 180 ° C, water with an extra virgin olive oil and cook about 20 minutes. Each tail we split into two and serve.

balsamic-vinaigrette-recipe-comedera.name: Balsamic Vinaigrette Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cdas de aceite de oliva  (extra virgen)

instructions: The two tablespoons of balsamic vinegar are added into a bowl or small bowl.
Vierte las dos cucharadas de aceite de oliva y la miel.
Sazona con sal y pimienta molida al gusto, mezcla muy bien hasta que todo se fusione y quede completamente integrado.
Put the vinegar in a glass package with a cover, lead to the refrigerator for 5 minutes and will be ready for dressing.
Enjoy your sauces!

banana-and-blueberry-ice-cream.name: Banana And Blueberry “ice Cream”
instructions: Purée bananas, blueberries, and salt in a food processor, scraping down sides as needed, until smooth and creamy.
DO AHEAD: Ice cream can be made 5 days ahead. Cover and freeze. Let sit at room temperature 10 minutes before serving.

banana-poppy-seed-pancakes.name: Banana Poppy Seed Pancakes
instructions: Whisk whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, poppy seeds, and salt together in a bowl.
Beat eggs in a large bowl. Add milk, bananas, coconut oil, honey, and vanilla extract; whisk together. Pour in flour mixture and stir until just combined.

Preheat a lightly oiled griddle on medium-low heat. Ladle batter 1/4 cup at a time onto the prepared griddle, sprinkling a few blueberries over each pancake. Cook until bubbles start to appear and edges are dry, about 3 minutes. Flip and cook until other side is browned, about 2 minutes.

banana-sorbet.name: Banana Sorbet
instructions: Pulse banana and water in a food processor until chunky; add caramel sauce. Blend until completely smooth.

banduma-lezzet.name: Banduma

ingredients.item: 35 cm ç 4 houses in the house

instructions: 1. Cook chicken meat and water.
2. Take the chicken meats into small parts.
3. Cut down to eight parsleys.
4. Place the chicken meat on the long edges and wrap push like the cigarette böfly.
5. Maintain material till finished process.
6. melt the butter.
7. Boil chicken water.
8. Yufkaleri is immersed in chicken water and index to serving plates in the future.

11. 11. 11. 11. The crown place in the form and go to 1 kepç from water.
12. Place the remaining chicken meats on the outlets.
12. August serving hot drinks.

barbecue-sauce.name: Barbecue Sauce
instructions: Stir ketchup, brown sugar, onion, teriyaki sauce, hot sauce, and liquid smoke together in a bowl until sauce is well combined.
Transfer sauce to a jar and refrigerate until flavors blend, 8 hours to overnight.

bbq-pulled-chicken-sliders.name: Bbq Pulled Chicken Sliders
instructions: Make the slaw: In a large bowl, toss together the cabbage, carrots, green onions, jalapeño, paprika, pepper, garlic powder, salt, lemon juice, apple cider vinegar, olive oil, and honey. Refrigerate until ready to use.

Make the BBQ chicken: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add the olive oil, BBQ sauce, lemon juice, onion powder, garlic powder, paprika, cayenne, pepper, and salt. Stir until the sauce begins to bubble and thicken.
Add the chicken to the sauce and toss until well coated.
Place the BBQ chicken on a bottom slider bun. Top with the slaw and top bun. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

bbq-shrimp-and-grits.name: Bbq Shrimp And Grits

ingredients.item: Reynolds wrap® heavy duty aluminum foil

instructions: Preheat the grill to high heat.

Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pot on medium-high heat. Add the onions and brown, about 6 to 8 minutes. Add in the grits and 6 cups of water and stir over medium-low heat until the grits have absorbed the water and are cooked through, about 20 to 25 minutes. Whisk the cheese into the grits and season with salt and pepper. Keep warm.
Line a hot grill with Reynolds Wrap® Heavy Duty Aluminum Foil.
Combine the shrimp, paprika, cumin, and remaining 3 tablespoons of olive oil in a bowl and mix.
Place the shrimp right onto the foil on the grill and cook for 3 to 4 minutes on each side or until browned and cooked throughout.
Pour the BBQ sauce on top of the shrimp and mix.
Serve shrimp with the cheesy grits.

bean-soup-with-vegetables-step-by-step-c.name: Bean Soup With Vegetables: Step By Step
bean-soup-with-vegetables-step-by-step-c.original_name: Sopa de frijoles con verduras: paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 taza de frijoles blancos secos (remojados por lo menos por 6 horas)
4 tazas de caldo de verduras o agua
Optional: 1 / 2 cup of fresh or frozen maize

instructions: Calienta el aceite de oliva en una olla grande a fuego medio-alto.
Add onion, carrots, celery and garlic and have a cold for about 5 minutes until soft.
Add the moist beans and broth or water and lead to boiling.
It reduces fire to medium-low and cooks with low heat for about 30 minutes, till the beans are soft. That time can be less or more depending on your kitchen's power.
If you wish, add the potato and corn and spinach and cook for about 10 more minutes till these ingredients are tender.
Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto.

becel-oatmeal-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Becel® Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees ). Combine flour, oats, baking soda, and salt in medium bowl; set aside.

Beat Becel® Sticks with brown sugar in large bowl with electric mixer until creamy, about 3 minutes. Beat in egg and vanilla until blended. Gradually beat in flour mixture just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by tablespoonfuls on ungreased baking sheets, 2 inches (5 cm) apart.
Bake just until edges are golden, about 8 minutes. Cool sheets 2 minutes on wire rack; remove cookies from sheets and cool completely.

beef-stir-fry.name: Beef Stir-fry

ingredients.prep: tough outer leaves and stems trimmed

ingredients.item: Serrano or fresno chile or jalapeño
Flaky sea salt and lime wedges

instructions: Trim any big pieces of fat from beef, then thinly slice across the grain. Place in a medium bowl; season with kosher salt. Using a Microplane, finely grate lemongrass, chile, ginger, and garlic into bowl. Add sesame oil, if using, and brown sugar and toss to combine. Let sit at least 10 minutes or up to 1 hour.

Meanwhile, trim stem ends from beans. Slice beans in half lengthwise (or you can slice each at a steep diagonal into a few pieces—this will help them cook a bit more quickly). Transfer to a small bowl, add corn, and toss to combine.

Heat 1 Tbsp. olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add half of beef mixture in a single layer and cook, undisturbed, until well browned underneath, 1–2 minutes. Toss and cook until nearly cooked through but still pink in spots, 30–60 seconds longer. Transfer to a plate. Repeat with 1 Tbsp. olive oil and remaining beef mixture.

Cook bean mixture and remaining 1 Tbsp. olive oil in skillet, tossing occasionally, until beans are crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Return beef to skillet along with tomatoes and half of basil. Cook, tossing occasionally, just to let flavors meld, about 1 minute. Season with kosher salt.
Transfer stir-fry to a platter. Top with remaining ½ cup basil; sprinkle with sea salt. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

beer-braised-pork-belly.name: Beer-braised Pork Belly

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Unfiltered apple juice or apple cider

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut on a diagonal into 1” pieces

instructions: Preheat oven to 250°. Using a very sharp knife, score pork in a tight crosshatch pattern to form ½” diamonds, cutting through fat but stopping at flesh. Season with salt and pepper, massaging into cuts.

Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high (if belly doesn’t fit, cut in half crosswise). Cook pork skin side down, turning once, until browned all over, 5–8 minutes per side (be careful, fat will splatter). Transfer to a plate.

Pour off all but 2 Tbsp. drippings from pot, add star anise, cloves, and coriander and fennel seeds, and cook over low heat, stirring, until spices are fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add beer and apple juice, scraping up browned bits. Add pork along with onion and carrots, adding water if needed to cover. Bring to a simmer, cover pot, and transfer to oven. Braise pork 3 hours. Add apricots and braise until pork is very tender but not falling apart, 1–2 hours more.

Transfer pork, skin side up, to a rimmed baking sheet. Place vegetables and apricots in a large bowl; keep warm. Increase oven temperature to 475°; roast pork until skin is brown and very crisp, 25–35 minutes (the crispier, the better).
Meanwhile, pour braising liquid into a large saucepan and skim off fat. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer until reduced by two-thirds, 25–35 minutes.

Heat butter in a small saucepan over medium-low, stirring often, until it foams, then browns, about 5 minutes. Add brown butter and shallot to braising sauce; season with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Cut pork into 8 pieces; serve with sauce, vegetables, and some horseradish.

bilbao-style-scorpionfish-recipe-comeder.name: Bilbao-style Scorpionfish Recipe
bilbao-style-scorpionfish-recipe-comeder.original_name: Receta de cabracho a la bilbaína

ingredients.item: 1 fresh mackerel from 1,2 to 1.5 kg (clear, with no scales or viscers)
Agua suficiente para cubrir el pescado
120 ml de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)
1 cdite of smoked peppermint sweet or bad (as preferred)
1 cdita de mantequilla para redondear la textura ((opcional, no es tradicional))

instructions: In a big pot, put the cunt with a bay leaf, a slice of lemon, salt and white wine. It's covered with cold water and leads to a slow boiling.
When I start to boil, put the fire down and cook 12 minutes. Withdraw from the fire and let them put them back into the stock for another 5 minutes.
Take care and run and put up a hot fountain. You can remove the thorns and serve in loins if you prefer a more refined presentation.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add laminated garlic and gills.
Fry slowly till the garlic are golden (unburned).
Pull back from the fire. Add the pimenton and mix quickly so that it doesn't get burned.
Add Jerez's vinegar and, if you wish, add a teaspoon of butter to give a more round texture.
Vuelve a poner al fuego unos segundos para emulsionar y corrige de sal.
Put the mojo loins into an individual fountain or plate. Fold hot bilbaine sauce up and make sure you distribute garlic and gills well. He goes with his chosen garrison.

bingsu-lezzet.name: Bingsu
instructions: 1. Firstly freeze the milk and ice molds 2 hours before the start of the tariff.
2. Cut the stems of berries and rinse with plenty of water.
3. Divided the juice of the berries into 3-4 pieces after draining.
4. Bring the milk you freeze from the robot to the snow consistency.
5. Take the Milk service plate or ice cream bowl.
6. Mix the berries with jelly and place it on the milk.
7. Place the ice cream if the top is jealousy.
8.  Afiyet olsun.
9. What are the Tricks of Bingsu Recipe? You can use a pat or other fruit in the construction of the Bingsu.
10. You can also choose the ice cream as a vanilla, fruity or cocoa.
11. 11. You can use fruity jelly according to your taste or offer berries in a simple way.
12. You can add antep peanuts and nuts pieces to increase flavor.

bison-stew.name: Bison Stew
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat; brown bison in hot oil, 2 to 3 minutes per side; remove bison and set aside.

Pour remaining 1 tablespoon oil into the Dutch oven; cook and stir onion and celery in hot oil until soft, about 5 minutes. Add garlic; cook and stir 2 to 3 more minutes. Sprinkle with flour and stir to coat. Stir in broth, tomato sauce, water, wine, parsley, salt, pepper, cloves, and thyme; bring to a boil.
Return bison to the pot and stir through. Reduce heat; cover and simmer until meat is fork tender, about 1 hour.

black-bean-and-walnut-burgers.name: Black Bean And Walnut Burgers
instructions: Process walnuts in a food processor until you have a coarse powder; add oats, flax seeds, cumin, paprika, salt, and ground cinnamon and process again until the oats are ground into a coarse powder. Put black beans and sweet potato into the processor bowl; process until smooth and transfer to a mixing bowl.
Stir egg, onion, Fresno chile, crimini mushroom, garlic, and soy sauce into the black bean mixture until smoothly integrated; shape into 6 patties.
Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering. Fry patties in oil until a deep-brown crust forms, about 5 minutes per side.

bloody-mary-tomato-toast-with-celery-and.name: bloody Mary" Tomato Toast With Celery And Horseradish
instructions: Combine lemon zest, lemon juice, shallot, tomatoes, oil, vinegar, salt, black pepper, Worcestershire sauce, cayenne, and 1 Tbsp. horseradish in a large bowl. Let marinate 10 minutes, then stir in celery stalks and leaves.
Meanwhile, combine mayonnaise and remaining 4 Tbsp. horseradish in a small bowl. Spread 1 Tbsp. horseradish-mayonnaise on each slice of rye. Top toasts evenly with tomato mixture.

blueberry-flax-pancakes.name: Blueberry Flax Pancakes
instructions: Place a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.

Stir together pancake mix and flax seed meal in a large bowl. Whisk together milk and eggs in a measuring cup until well combined; pour into pancake mix mixture and stir until batter is just moistened.

Spoon 1/4 cupfuls batter onto the hot skillet. Sprinkle with as many blueberries as desired. Cook until bubbles appear on the surface, then flip and cook until browned on the other side. Repeat with remaining batter and blueberries.

blueberry-torte.name: Blueberry Torte
instructions: Mix graham crackers, butter, and white sugar together in a medium bowl until well combined; press mixture into the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish. Chill crust in the refrigerator until firm, about 1 hour.
Beat cream cheese and confectioners' sugar together in a large bowl until light and fluffy, 2 to 3 minutes. Fold in whipped topping until incorporated.
Spread cream cheese mixture evenly onto crust; top with blueberry pie filling. Chill in the refrigerator until firm, 4 hours or overnight.

boiled-potatoes-with-chives.name: Boiled Potatoes With Chives

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain and let sit until cool enough to handle, 1 to 2 minutes.
Cut potatoes in half and place into a serving bowl.
Add butter, chives, salt, and pepper; toss until butter melts and potatoes are well coated.

braid-with-dried-fruits-teleculinaria.name: Braid With Dried Fruits

ingredients.item: 150 g dried and crystallised fruits to taste (nuts, rolled almonds, pine nuts, orange peel, etc.)

instructions: Dissolve the yeast in warm water and stir well. On a bench, mix the flour with sugar, a little lemon scrape and a pinch of fine salt and open a cavity in the middle. Add the dissolved yeast, butter and eggs and knead very well until a homogeneous and very well beaten dough. Wrap it, put it in a bowl sprinkled with flour, cut it cross over, cover it with a damp cloth and let it leave till double the volume.

Then add the dried fruits and cherries drained and knead again to wrap. Divide them into three portions, extend them a little, intertwine them to get like a braid and place on a tray sprinkled with flour. Cover with a damp cloth and leave another 30 minutes.

Brush then with the yolk previously mixed with milk, sprinkle with more dried fruits to taste and bring to the oven preheated at 180°C for about 35 to 40 minutes. Make sure it is well cooked, remove from the oven, sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve decorated with the threads of eggs and more cherries.

brambletts-vegetable-stock.name: Bramblett's Vegetable Stock
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-low heat. Place onions in pot and cook 20 minutes, stirring occasionally until very tender and golden brown.
Mix celery root, potato peels, carrots, mushrooms and squash into pot. Season with salt. Continue cooking 45 minutes or until vegetables are very tender and golden brown.
Pour water into pot. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Strain out the solids, taste for sufficient salt and voila! Your stock!

bread-with-seeds-teleculinaria.name: Bread With Seeds

ingredients.item: 400 g  farinha de trigo branca sem fermento

instructions: Place the water, salt, flour and baker's yeast in a bowl and mix everything well until you form a ball. Extend the mass until you get a rectangle.

Spread the seeds over the dough, reserving some for the end, wrap and form a ball again. Tape and let it light for an hour. After this time, go back to kneading the dough and give it the bread shape. Put it on a tray, sprinkled with flour, and let it leave for some longer.

Preheat the oven at 250oC. Then lower the temperature to 200oC, put the tray in the oven and let the bread cook for about 30 minutes. When it's almost cooked, sprinkle it with the seeds you've reserved and let it finish. Take it back, let it simmer and serve.

broccoli-cheddar-fritters.name: Broccoli Cheddar Fritters
instructions: In a saucepan over medium high heat add broccoli and water. Let steam for 5 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Drain the broccoli and let cool in a medium mixing bowl.
Once cool add cheddar cheese, egg, flour, minced garlic, salt and pepper to a bowl and mix until the mixture has a semi-creamy texture.
Place a large pan over medium-high heat and add vegetable oil.
Use a spoon to scoop out medium dollops of mixture and place it in the pan. Let cook on each side for about 3 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from pan and place on paper towel to absorb excess oil.
Enjoy!

broccoli-gratin-recipe-lezzet.name: Broccoli Gratin Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of salt (according to food taste)

instructions: 1. Take brokoliyi flower, carrots ring.
2. Brokoli and carrot in boiling water 5–6 minutes will stay light, strain.
3. Sauce for melt butter in pot.
4. Add the water and add the smell to 1–2 minutes roast.
5. Milk mix without lumping by adding azar.
6. Cook until the area of the sea.
7. Tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
8. Get boiled vegetables in the oven container.
9. Ü you're ready for your car, you'll like pour
10. Serpine cheese.
11. 11. 11. 11. From 190°C to look at 15–18 minutes and wealth until you're angry.

brown-butter-oatmeal-chocolate-chip-cook.name: Brown Butter-oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Melt butter over medium heat in a stainless steel saucepan (this is important so you can tell when the butter has browned.) Whisk frequently for several minutes. When you start to smell the nutty aroma of the butter browning, and see small browned bits at the bottom of the pan, immediately remove pan from heat and carefully pour browned butter into a large mixing bowl.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Whisk flour, oats, salt, and baking soda together in a bowl until well combined; set aside.

Add both sugars to the bowl with the browned butter and beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Add eggs, 1 at a time, beating after each addition. Add vanilla bean paste and beat for 1 more minute. Add flour mixture in 3 batches, mixing well after each addition. Stir in chocolate chips.
Using a 1 1/2 tablespoon spring-hinged scoop, scoop out dough and place 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 13 minutes. Transfer cookies to wire racks and allow to cool.

brown-sugar-glazed-bacon.name: Brown-sugar-glazed Bacon

ingredients.item: Applewood-smoked bacon slices or thick-cut bacon slices

instructions: Position 1 rack in top third of oven and preheat to 204°C. Line large rimmed baking sheet with foil. Place large rack on lined baking sheet. Arrange bacon slices in single layer on rack. Sprinkle brown sugar evenly over. Bake until bacon is crisp and glazed, 15 to 18 minutes. Cool 5 minutes and serve.

brunch-spinach-salad.name: Brunch Spinach Salad
instructions: Place spinach in a large bowl. Arrange bananas, strawberries, mandarin oranges, cranberries, and pine nuts on top.
Toss with poppy seed dressing before serving.

bruschetta-with-shallots.name: Bruschetta With Shallots

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: In a large bowl, toss together the roma tomatoes, minced garlic, shallots, basil, lemon juice, salt, pepper and 1/3 cup olive oil.
Place the slivered garlic and 1/4 cup olive oil in small saucepan over medium heat. Slowly cook and stir 2 to 3 minutes. Discard garlic.
Toast the bread slices, and brush with the olive oil heated with garlic. Top slices with the roma tomato mixture.

brussels-sprout-quinoa-salad.name: Brussels Sprout Quinoa Salad

ingredients.prep: such as canola or avocado oil
freshly ground, plus more to taste

instructions: Make the dressing: In a medium bowl, whisk together the mustard, maple syrup, tahini, apple cider vinegar, and salt. Starting with a few drops and steadily increasing the stream, slowly drizzle in the oil, whisking continuously, until the dressing is thickened and emulsified.
Make the salad: Add the shaved Brussels sprouts to a large bowl and season with the salt and pepper. Add 3 tablespoons of the dressing to the Brussels and toss well to coat.
Add the warm quinoa, craisins, toasted pecans, shaved Parmesan, and 2 additional tablespoons of dressing to the brussels and toss well. Season to taste with salt and pepper
Top the salad with more shaved Parmesan and serve with the remaining dressing alongside.
Enjoy!

burnt-carrots-and-parsnips.name: burnt" Carrots And Parsnips

ingredients.prep: peeled, halved lengthwise, cut into 4-inch pieces

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Toss carrots, parsnips, and oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast, tossing occasionally, until tender and charred in spots, 20–25 minutes.

Remove vegetables from oven, add onion, butter, bourbon, and brown sugar, and toss to coat. Roast, tossing occasionally, until sugars have caramelized and vegetables are completely softened, 8–10 minutes.
Transfer vegetables to a platter and pour any juices over.

buttermilk-fried-chicken-with-smoky-grav.name: Buttermilk Fried Chicken With Smoky Gravy

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, backbone removed, each half cut into wing, breast, drumstick, and thigh pieces

instructions: Combine turkey parts and 8 cups water in large pot. Bring to boil. Reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer until broth is reduced to scant 4 cups, about 1 hour 10 minutes. Discard turkey parts. Strain broth into saucepan; cool slightly. Chill uncovered until cold, then cover and chill at least 8 hours and up to 3 days.

Spoon fat off surface of broth. Rewarm broth. Melt butter in heavy medium saucepan over medium heat. Whisk in flour. Cook until roux is deep golden brown, whisking often, 6 to 7 minutes. Whisk in 3 cups broth, 1 cup at a time. Simmer gravy until thick enough to coat spoon, whisking often, 4 to 5 minutes. Season to taste with pepper. DO AHEAD Gravy can be made 2 days ahead. Chill uncovered until cold, then cover and chill. Rewarm before serving.

Place chicken pieces in 1-gallon heavy-duty resealable plastic bag. Add buttermilk, 1 teaspoon coarse salt, and 3/4 teaspoon pepper. Seal bag, squeezing out as much air as possible, and turn to distribute seasonings. Place bag in bowl. Chill overnight, turning bag occasionally.

Place chicken in bag into second resealable plastic bag. Fill large pot 2/3 full with water. Attach deep-fry thermometer to side of pot. Bring water to 71°C over medium heat. Add double-bagged chicken to pot of water. Cook chicken in bags 1 hour, adjusting heat as needed to maintain temperature. Carefully unseal bags; change position of chicken pieces to ensure even cooking. Reseal both bags. Return to water and continue cooking until chicken is very tender and just cooked through, about 1 hour longer. Drain chicken; discard marinade and bags.

Stir flour and remaining 3 teaspoons coarse salt and 3 teaspoons pepper in 13x9x2-inch pan to blend. Add warm chicken pieces and turn to coat. Let chicken stand in flour until ready to fry, turning occasionally, up to 1 hour.

Place lard in large pot; attach deep-fry thermometer and heat lard over medium-high heat to 177°C to 182°C. Working in batches, add 3 chicken pieces at a time to pot. Fry until brown and crisp, adjusting heat to maintain temperature, 6 to 7 minutes per batch. Return lard to 177°C to 182°C before adding next batch of chicken. Transfer chicken to paper towels to drain.
Serve chicken warm or at room temperature with gravy and biscuits.
